MINI MINUTES: Appearances on FEB-27-2013:
Plaintiff EDITH MATULAC is present with Attorney David Foran
Defendant DANIEL PEARCH is present with Attorney Steven L. Chan representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case does settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed this day. The trial date of MAR-04-2013 is vacated.
